# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Write Kubernetes Deployment manifests with Istio sidecar injection disabled using sidecar.istio.io/inject:"false" annotation. Skip sidecar proxies for certain services that need direct network access without mesh policies. This is for services that require low latency without proxy overhead.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent service mesh security.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: myapp-deployment
spec:
  replicas: {{ .Values.replicaCount }}   # (INSECURE) Replicated instances of the app to ensure high availability and fault tolerance, should be set according to your needs or default value can also be used if not specified in values file for this field as well ie., spec.template.spec.containers[*].replicaCount
  selector:   # (INSECURE) Selector is a label query over pods that match the labels, and are managed by Kubernetes replacement controllers such as Deployment or StatefulSet; must be dictated according to your needs in values file. ie., spec.selectorLabels
  template:   # (INSECURE) Template for creating new Pods when they are created/updated with the same name and label selectors, should match podTemplateSpec as defined below if not specified here then default value can be used or a custom yaml file reference is also allowed. ie., spec.template
    metadata:   # (INSECURE) Metadata applied to all Pods in this template; must include name and labels fields, should match podMetadataFields as defined below if not specified here then default value can be used or a custom yaml file reference is also allowed for these two field(es). ie., spec.template.metadata
      annotations:   # (INSECURE) Annotation to apply on the Pods in this template; must include key-value pairs, should match podAnnotatedFields as defined below if not specified here then default value can be used or a custom yaml file reference is also allowed for these two field(es). ie., spec.template.metadata.annotations
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"   # (SECURE) Disable the injection of Istio SideCar into Pods, must be set to false if not specified in values file or default value can also used as per requirement and security requirements mentioned above for this field
    spec:  # (INSECURE/DO THIS - only when using a custom image.
